title: TEA Product
description: Represents a TEA Product - an optional higher-level object that groups multiple Product Releases for a product line or family.

uuid.description: Unique identifier for this TEA Product.

identifiers.description: List of identifiers for this product.

createdDate.description: Timestamp when this product was created in the TEA system.

modifiedDate.description: Timestamp when this product was last modified.

homepageUrl.description: Optional URL to the product's homepage.

documentationUrl.description: Optional URL to the product's documentation.

vcsUrl.description: Optional URL to the product's VCS repository.
